caption: Sometimes the biggest dreams are stopped by an empty pocket… 💔 He had no money. She had only one dream—to go to school. Even after being turned away, he didn’t give up. Because a brother’s love is stronger than poverty. ❤️📚 Watch till the end to see if her dream comes true. 🥺 #ai #BrotherSisterLove #cats #cat #kitten
